Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Asphodel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Asphodel attacks the mind and the spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Asphodel is a Territory.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Asphodel is associated with a glowing mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Asphodel Travelers wear traditional mist-gray robes and white masks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Asphodel summoned a glowing mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Cynara's trial took place in Asphodel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Asphodel is suited for subduing Endross because it feeds on the target's emotions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Asphodel is a place where Talos could be questioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Grandmaster Asphodel was killed in battle the previous week.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Asphodel will spread and grow and seek the wild energy of emotion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Asphodel contains formidable guardians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Asphodel is one of the Grandmasters who was not spiked on the city gates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Asphodel infected schools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Elysian Incarnation has recruited forty-two Asphodel Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Crops can be obtained from Asphodel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Indirial mentions Asphodel.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
